rationale: Touched-package verification is green: go test -count=1 passed for cmd/mindspec, internal/panel, internal/config, internal/complete, and plugins/mindspec. go build ./... exits 0 under sandbox-safe Go settings; the only output is the environment's module stat-cache write warning. Real-binary probes at 0f7e1a1 confirmed R1 non-bead stale targets block without bead/ or complete-advice leakage; R3 --gate stamps final_review defaults and rejects invalid gates before write; R2 rejects bare $, preserves prior metacharacter rejection, and the .claude mirror is byte-identical; R4 TestLoad_EmptyStringModel passes. The new G2 security fix also passes with the real binary: a semicolon-bearing target is shell-quoted in tally recovery and control-byte targets render escaped, with no forged recovery line. Diff scope remains the four fixes plus tests, docs, tracked review artifacts, and .beads regeneration with r6hk.3 closed.
